title: Document Agentic Collaboration-Plane Injection incident
intent: Create a defensive incident-response write-up repository for agentic issue-comment artifact smuggling, using static-analysis-only evidence, IOCs, detection guidance, safe artifact handling, and agentic intake policy.
stop_conditions: Do not execute attacker artifacts, install unknown packages, fetch live payloads, or commit malware.

forbidden_paths: raw malware samples and executable attacker artifacts
